_doc.purpose: Localization companion for dictionary_Intro.json. Holds en-us entries for the char_editor_selectTrait_* character-creation trait-selection screen.

en-us.char_editor_selectTrait_single_tooltip: This type of trait doesn't conflict with other traits.
en-us.char_editor_selectTrait_spectrum_tooltip: Only one trait from the same spectrum can be selected (pick 1).
en-us.char_editor_selectTrait_Constitution_sco: %%stats_base_Constitution%% traits' total score cannot exceed this attribute's stat adjustment ($score$)
en-us.char_editor_selectTrait_Psyche_scoreErro: %%stats_base_Psyche%% traits' total score cannot exceed this attribute's stat adjustment ($score$)
en-us.char_editor_selectTrait_Strength_scoreEr: %%stats_base_Strength%% traits' total score cannot exceed this attribute's stat adjustment ($score$)
en-us.char_editor_selectTrait_Willpower_scoreE: %%stats_base_Willpower%% traits' total score cannot exceed this attribute's stat adjustment ($score$)
